name: Cinnamon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes.
3. Beat cheese until fluffy. Add sugar, then beat in eggs until very smooth.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until firm in the center. (May take 30 minutes)
5. Mix sour cream, sugar, and vanilla. Spoon onto cake.
6. Sprinkle with cinnamon, and distribute nuts over the top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
8. Cool and refrigerate.
This cake is better made at least 1 day ahead.
